## Architecture

### Project Structure
```
project/
├── apps/
│   ├── web/             # [Frontend framework] frontend
│   └── api/             # [Backend runtime] backend
├── packages/
│   ├── shared/          # Shared types & utilities
│   └── ui/              # UI component library
└── docs/                # Documentation
```

## Development Commands

```bash
[package-manager] install       # Install dependencies
[package-manager] dev           # Run all packages
[package-manager] build         # Build all
[package-manager] lint          # Linting
[package-manager] typecheck     # Type checking
```
